description_long: This object is a single oyster shell, elongated and slightly curved, with a rough, layered exterior. The shell displays a mix of creamy white, beige, and brown hues, with darker patches and streaks concentrated near the broader end. Its surface is marked by irregular, wavy ridges and subtle striations, giving it a weathered, natural appearance. The edge of the shell is uneven and jagged, with some areas appearing thicker and more pronounced. The shell's luster is mostly matte with occasional dull, pearly highlights, especially along the ridges. The natural opening is off-center, located at the narrower end, and is not prominently gaping.
description: A rough, elongated oyster shell with wavy ridges, creamy and brown coloration, and a matte, weathered surface.
description_view_0: The shell appears narrow and pointed, with visible brown and beige streaks and a slightly jagged edge.
description_view_1: The broader, more textured side is visible, showing darker brown patches and pronounced surface ridges.
description_view_2: A side profile highlights the shell's elongated, curved form and the layered, striated surface.
description_view_3: The convex, outer surface is shown, with layered bands and a mix of light and dark coloration along the shell's length.
attribute_shell_pattern: The shell surface features irregular, wavy striations running lengthwise, interspersed with darker spots and bands, especially near the broader end. Color gradients shift from creamy white to brown, with some areas showing mottled, patchy markings. The patterning is dense and layered, with no uniform repetition, giving the shell a natural, weathered look.
attribute_shell_ridges: There are several prominent, irregularly spaced ridges running parallel to the shell's length, with some being more raised and pronounced than others. The ridges are not uniform, varying in thickness and height, and are more noticeable on the broader, convex side of the shell.
attribute_shell_opening_orientation: The natural opening is off-center, positioned at the narrower, pointed end of the shell, and is aligned along the shell's length. It is not centrally located and appears to be at the edge rather than the middle.
attribute_shell_edge_contour: The outer edge of the shell is jagged and irregular, with wavy, scalloped contours. Some sections are thicker and more pronounced, while others are thinner and sharper, contributing to a rugged, natural outline.
attribute_shell_luster: The shell exhibits a mostly matte luster with occasional dull, pearly highlights along the ridges. The sheen is subtle and uneven, lacking any glossy or iridescent qualities.
